evals.prompt: Generate a unit-test project for the Spark UDF at input/array-segment-sum/ArraySegmentSumUDF.scala, and confirm the tests pass on the CPU.
evals.expected_output: A unit-test project that registers and runs the actual UDF and asserts its real outputs across the UDF's edge cases, with a code-coverage report showing the UDF's branches are well covered; the test compiles and passes on the CPU.
assertions: Writes a unit test that registers and executes the actual UDF, with assertions reflecting its real outputs (not hardcoded/tautological values)

Covers the UDF's edge cases: bounded dynamic slicing, clipping at array end, null array/start/length, out-of-range start, non-positive length, empty array, null elements in the segment, and ordinary zero/negative elements
Runs the test on the CPU and it passes
Runs a code-coverage report and confirms the UDF's lines/branches are well covered, adding cases for any gaps (or documenting ones that are out of scope)

evals.prompt: What does the spark.sql.shuffle.partitions setting control?
evals.expected_output: A one-line conceptual Spark-config answer; not a request to generate a UDF unit test, so udf-gen-test should not activate.
assertions: Does not load the udf-gen-test skill

evals.prompt: Write a Python regex that validates email addresses.
evals.expected_output: Unrelated to Spark UDFs or GPU conversion; no UDF skill should activate.
assertions: Does not load the udf-gen-test skill
